send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Birch: Hi there! I'm your concierge at Birch. I noticed you had our Birch Natural Mattress in your cart. Is there something holding you back that I can help with?

https://birchliving.attn.tv/axeIKvBrkA2n 

- Sarah  Stop to stop
Birch: Don't worry! We saved your cart. Head back to checkout before it's too late. https://birchliving.attn.tv/aCde71QGtYrc  Stop to stop
Birch: Hey there! Your product is almost ready to ship! In the meantime, check out some tips to clean and maintain your Birch mattress. https://birchliving.attn.tv/aUWNKKnJT3ZD  Stop to stop

Birch: Hey Valerie, this is Sarah . Thanks for checking us out! 😊 https://birchliving.attn.tv/aHqQOIxRnewZ 

Any questions I can answer for you?  Stop to stop
When will my order ship

Birch: Thank you for your purchase! I've checked and it shows your order is confirmed. I'm afraid I can't provide an exact date. The natural mattress is shipping from our facility within 5-10 business days of your order, whereas the luxe mattress is shipping within 1-4 weeks with no-contact delivery. Items will ship separately and as each ships out from our facility, you will receive FedEx tracking and an estimated delivery date via email. I hope this helps!
Thank you. Also, I can't make a price for additional insurance coverage come up - states - add it on your mattress order form.
Template used: "Have a great day! - ALL BRANDS"; last updated: 2022-07-05 16:55:29.721
Birch: You're welcome! I understand your not being able to add additional insurance coverage to your mattress order. If you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text.

Covercraft: Hi there, it's Sarah. I'm a personal concierge here to answer your questions or share recommendations. Is there anything I can help you with today?

https://covercraft.attn.tv/aE7DRtUXD30W .

I'm not sure what type of seat covers to consider ?
I have a special needs son who is not neatness person, in fact spills are a very common occurrence.
I own a 
2015 Toyota Tundra Crew max 
Suggestions

Covercraft: I completely understand wanting to protect your Toyota Tundra's interior with a special needs rider in mind. Spills happen, and Covercraft offers a variety of seat cover options to fit your needs. Here are some suggestions to consider: Endura PrecisionFit Custom Seat Covers are an excellent choice for prioritizing ultimate spill protection and durability for your car. The easy cleaning and potentially simpler installation are additional benefits. However, if a luxurious look or superior breathability is important to you, Leatherette might be a better fit.

Endura: https://covercraft.attn.tv/aE0Egf2WAbBz

Leatherette: https://covercraft.attn.tv/adA9TQZAIk-Y

Let me know if you have any questions.

Help
Dermstore: Sure, I'm here to help! Could you please provide more details about the issue or question you have?
I'm trying to order with my code and it's not allowing me to purchase. When I did the chat before the agent disconnected abruptly
Do you have a moms day code that beats the 15% 1st sign up

Dermstore: Sorry to hear that! Are there any error messages showing up? Mind sending me a screenshot of your cart? I'll be happy to look into this for you. And if you'd prefer, you can get a complimentary $91 SkinCeuticals C E Ferulic 15ml gift with your $250+ brand spend. Use code: VITC Let me know how that goes, I'll be here if you have any questions!
Do you offer any military discounts through id me or Sheer id ?
Dermstore: Thank you for your service! No, but we currently offer them through gocertify. You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://dermstore.attn.tv/sl/6XkzrUTv
Ok how much is the discount?
Dermstore: Good question. It's 15% off selected products and you can start the process through the link above. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Can it apply to the order in my cart?

Dermstore: I'm sorry! I don't have direct access to your cart but to identify if the code qualifies for the items, the best way to handle this is to give us a call at 1 (801) 252-4624, Monday - Friday 8am-5pm, and Saturday, 10am-5pm (EST). Our team is happy to help!
Ok thank you
Is the military code good for life or one time?
Dermstore: Yes, the 15% military discount can be applied to your current order. It's not a one-time use and can be used indefinitely. You can apply it at dermstore.com.
Thank you!

Do you see the red message?
